page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Rapid sensitive and accurate dna read mapping via quasi-mapping
page_metadata.biotools__summary: RapMap is a tool implementing quasi-mapping and is capable of mapping sequencing reads to a target transcriptome substantially faster than existing alignment tools.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RapMap is a tool implementing quasi-mapping and is capable of mapping sequencing reads to a target transcriptome substantially faster than existing alignment tools.
